name: Warm Springs Fried Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients; cut in butter until well mixed.
2. Add enough warm milk to make a soft dough, easy to handle. Knead on a floured board until the dough is very smooth and soft but elastic. Do not use a lot of extra flour.
3. Divide dough into 6-8 balls and brush the tops with melted butter. Cover and let stand for 30-45 minutes.
4. Pat each ball into a round, about 5 or 6 inches in diameter and 1/4 inch thick.
5. Fry in deep fat (preheated to 365 degrees). The dough should rise immediately to the surface.
6. Cook until brown on one side, then turn and cook until brown on the other side, being careful not to pierce the crust.
7. Drain on absorbent paper and serve hot.
